headline: A Look At Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Moves
summary: Why Public Service Enterprise Group is on investors’ radar today Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) has drawn fresh attention after recent price moves, with the stock closing at $83.35. Investors are weighing that level against its earnings profile and recent share performance. See our latest analysis for Public Service Enterprise Group. That recent pullback, including a 0.7% 1 day share price decline and 3.2% 7 day share price return, comes after steadier gains, with a 30 day share price...
